recent.snippet: Hey Hiltsje — thanks for flagging the guides count. You were spot on, and it turned out to be bigger than just Xero: we traced it to an upstream data issue where the published-guide counts aren't coming through from Pendo's ingestion (even though guide activity is tracked fine).
